title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down four strategies Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan uses with Claude Code to ship large codebases efficiently: role assignment, parallel sessions, custom tooling, and planning before building. The video references Tan's open-source gstack system and discusses agentic AI workflows for productivity.
